title: Miketavious's Auto Miner
description: An client side auto miner for Minecraft
body:
# Miketavious Auto Miner
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6000c9c73286e22fd581a6a0106030d5e577a4dc.png)
**Effortless mining at your fingertips! Simply look at blocks and watch them break automatically.**

## Features

**Intelligent Tool System**
- **Pickaxe Mode**: Only mines when holding pickaxes
- **Axe Mode**: Only mines when holding axes  
- **Shovel Mode**: Only mines when holding shovels
- **Tools Mode**: Works with any mining tool (pickaxe, axe, shovel)
- **All Mode**: Mines with anything in your hand - even empty hands!

**Durability Protection**
- Automatically stops mining when your tool gets low on durability
- Configurable threshold (1-100% remaining durability)
- Never accidentally break your precious tools again

**Clean Configuration**
- Intuitive config screen via ModMenu
- Toggle messages on/off
- Choose between action bar or chat notifications

## Installation

1. Download and install the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app)
2. Create a new Minecraft 1.21.5+ instance with Fabric
3. Install dependencies:
   - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
   - [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) 
   - [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
4. Add this mod to your instance
5. Launch and enjoy!

## Usage

1. Hold any mining tool (or any item, depending on your settings)
2. Press **K** to toggle auto mining
3. Look at blocks to mine them automatically
4. Configure settings through ModMenu → Auto Mine Configuration

## Compatibility

- **Client-side only** - works on any server
- **Minecraft 1.21.5+** with Fabric Loader
- Compatible with most other mods
- No server installation required

Perfect for long mining sessions, resource gathering, and reducing hand strain from repetitive clicking.

I use a three-part versioning format where the first number denotes major releases, the second indicates feature updates, and the third represents bug fixes and minor Minecraft version updates and improvements/changes.

<details>
<summary>Why I made this mod</summary>

_Note: In all honesty I made this mod becuase [Toro's Auto Miner](https://modrinth.com/mod/toros-auto-mine) hasnt been updated in like 6 months becusae he was waiting for a library to be updated, I decided I just need to make my own solution since their mod is taking way to long to update._

</details>
